history.text: Sultanate was established, giving Brunei a new political framework.
Protectorate of British Raj placed the territory under outside administration.
Constitution adopted and self-governance territory transferred to direct control of the United Kingdom.
Brunei revolt appears in Brunei's historical record.
Brunei became independent from the United Kingdom, marking a key step in modern statehood.

worthSeeing.title: Omar Ali Saifuddien Mosque:
worthSeeing.text: Golden-domed mosque on a lagoon, one of Southeast Asia's most beautiful.

worthSeeing.title: Kampong Ayer:
worthSeeing.text: The world's largest water village, home to 39,000 people on stilts over Brunei River.

worthSeeing.title: Ulu Temburong National Park:
worthSeeing.text: Pristine primary rainforest accessible only by boat and on foot.

planningQuestions.a: Omar Ali Saifuddien Mosque, Kampong Ayer, Ulu Temburong National Park.
